eqTrace:primary-commodity.eqTrace:description: FREIGHT ALL KINDS, (FAK) OR ALL FREIGHT RATE SHIPMENTS, NEC, OR TRAILER-ON FLATCAR SHIPMENTS, COMMERCIAL (EXCEPT IDENTIFIED BY COMMODITIES, THEN CODE BY COMMODITY)
